## Summary

Provide a concise summary of the change and its purpose.

## Motivation

Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve?

## Changes Made

- [ ] Implemented the requested feature or fix
- [ ] Updated relevant documentation
- [ ] Added or updated tests or verification steps

## Testing

Please describe how this was verified.

- [ ] Local development server runs
- [ ] Production build completes successfully
- [ ] Linting passes
- [ ] Manual verification completed
- [ ] Relevant integration or UI behavior verified

## Type Safety and Quality

- [ ] No new TypeScript errors introduced
- [ ] Existing type checks remain valid
- [ ] No console warnings or obvious regressions introduced
- [ ] Sensitive data handling remains secure

## UI and UX Checklist

- [ ] Interface remains responsive on common screen sizes
- [ ] Accessibility basics were considered
- [ ] Visual consistency with the existing design system is maintained
- [ ] No unintended layout or interaction regressions

## Related Issues

List any related issues, discussions, or references.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the contributing guidelines
- [ ] I have followed the project’s coding standards
- [ ] I have verified the change locally
- [ ] I understand this PR may require follow-up review
